summary: Tested Videocorso AI-driven endpoints and Masterclass PDF materials. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: VideocorsoPage renders correctly with hero section, 3 input options (durata selector, bonus toggle, contenuti toggle), course output with modules/lessons/bonus/pricing, and completed banner. MasterclassPage shows MATERIALI UTILI section with 3 PDF links (Template Script, Struttura Tipo, Consigli Registrazione).
seed_data_creation: Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) already has videocorso data with course_approved=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: All videocorso AI endpoints working correctly. Partner 2 has complete videocorso data with 4 modules (medio duration). The 3 masterclass PDF materials are accessible at /api/materials/masterclass/{template-script|struttura-tipo|consigli-registrazione}. Frontend VideocorsoPage and MasterclassPage render correctly with all expected elements.
